## omqctl storage get

Get a value by key from a storage

### Synopsis

The 'storage get' command retrieves the value for a given key from the specified storage.

```
omqctl storage get <storage> [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help         help for get
      --key string   Key to retrieve
```
